hero.trustSignal: Registered with the Order of Psychologists of Lombardy, Register A (No. 22963)

whyPsychologist.title: Why See a Psychologist?
whyPsychologist.paragraph1: In a society where everything moves quickly, where we struggle to find time to reflect on what is happening to us, we are increasingly connected, but without real connections.
whyPsychologist.paragraph2: A psychologist can help create a space for self-reflection, a protected place where you can explore your emotions, thoughts, and behaviors without judgment.
whyPsychologist.paragraph3: A psychological journey can help you better understand yourself, develop new strategies for dealing with difficulties, and improve the quality of your relationships.

practicalInfo.title: Practical Information
practicalInfo.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start a journey

whenToSeek.title: When to Seek Help
whenToSeek.description: Suffering is a very subjective matter. What may be painful for us might seem superficial to others, but this does not invalidate it. Being aware of what you feel inside is the first step.

duration.title: Duration and Process
duration.description: Each session lasts approximately 50 minutes. The journey generally spans from a few months to a year, based on the goals we agree upon together.

frequency.title: Session Frequency
frequency.description: The frequency is typically weekly or biweekly. It is agreed upon together based on personal needs and the goals of the journey.

journey.title: The Therapeutic Journey
journey.paragraph1: The therapeutic journey focuses on the individual with the aim of supporting them in processing critical moments in life that create distress and that they feel unable to manage independently.
journey.paragraph2: In the process, we focus on the individual and how they face different situations (relationships, work, and daily life), with particular attention to relational dynamics, while enhancing and strengthening the resources they already possess.
journey.paragraph3: My approach is based on the therapeutic relationship as the main tool for change, in a context of empathetic and non-judgmental listening.

booking.title: Book Now
booking.subtitle: Choose the date and time that work best for you and book directly online

interventionAreas.subtitle: Areas where I can offer you support

hero.title: About Me
hero.subtitle: Psychologist and Psychotherapist specialized in Individual Psychoanalytic Psychotherapy

intro.name: Dr. Stefano Icardi
intro.description1: I provide psychological support and individual therapy for adults. My approach is relational, integrated, and personalized.
intro.description2: I am registered with the Order of Psychologists of Lombardy, Register A

formazione.title: Education
formazione.degree: Master's Degree in Clinical Psychology and Health Promotion
formazione.school: COIRAG (Confederazione di Organizzazioni Italiane per la Ricerca Analitica sui Gruppi), Milan
formazione.registration: Register A - Order of Psychologists of Lombardy

areaFormativa.title: Educational Background
areaFormativa.description1: I graduated with full marks in Clinical Psychology and Health Promotion from the Università Cattolica del Sacro Cuore, with a thesis on Borderline Personality Disorder and Mentalization-Based Treatment (MBT), based on the observation of interviews and group sessions at the CPS of Pavia.
areaFormativa.description2: I completed my specialization on 21 December 2025 in Group-Analytic Psychotherapy at the COIRAG (Confederazione di Organizzazioni Italiane per la Ricerca Analitica sui Gruppi) school in Milan. I am currently completing a Master's in Psychodiagnostics at ARP (Studio Associato di Psicologia Clinica), through which I am learning various assessment tools including the Rorschach, TAT, MMPI, WISC and WAIS, which I apply in my clinical practice.
areaFormativa.description3: During my training I completed several internships in the field of addiction. Notably, I worked at Studio Galimberti, which offers a cutting-edge service integrating neuroscience with TMS (Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation) and psychological pathways. I also completed an internship at a SER.D in Milan, where I followed various patients individually and conducted group sessions. My final internship took place at a CPS in Milan, where I worked individually with patients with various psychiatric diagnoses.

attivita.title: Work Experience
attivita.description1: Since 2021 I have been working with TELUS Health Italia, a national platform, to promote corporate well-being by providing psychological support to employees and their families.
attivita.description2: Since 2023, I collaborate with Centro Medico Santagostino, where I conduct individual psychological sessions for adults. In particular, I am part of the Addiction Team, where I focus on the assessment and treatment of individuals with addictions, both substance-related and behavioral.
attivita.description3: I also provide psychological support and consultancy directly at my practice in Milan, Viale Luigi Majno, 38.
